hooks.action: If memory-curator is active, load memory/hot-cache.md into context. Summarize active campaign and open blockers in 3 bullets.
If prompt matches any metadata.triggers in the library, suggest the matching engine by name before responding.
If the tool produced content or audit data, check if content-scorekeeper or trust-signal-auditor should run next. Suggest if relevant.
Offer to save session findings to memory if memory-curator is active. Summarize key decisions and open loops.
